uplink.description: CO2, temperature and humidity (TTN example bytes)

uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds vector. expected.data produced by the ORACLE method: ran reference/upstream-codec.js on this input (CO2Raw=600, CO2Filtered=595, Temperature=18.5, Humidity=42) then mapped CO2Filtered->air.co2, Temperature->air.temperature, Humidity->air.relativeHumidity, CO2Raw->co2Raw extra.

Synthetic in-bounds vector. expected.data produced by the ORACLE method: ran reference/upstream-codec.js on this input (CO2Raw=410, CO2Filtered=415, Temperature=25.75, Humidity=60.1) then applied the same key mapping.

uplink.description: Wrong payload length returns an error
uplink._note: Upstream returns null for any length != 12 on fPort 1; we surface an error per the output contract.
Upstream only decodes fPort 1 (returns null otherwise); we surface an error per the output contract.
